headline: PASS YOUR CLEANING VALIDATION AUDIT
subheading: What inspectors really probe, from worst-case rationale to recovery studies and data integrity.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial macro composition evoking pharmaceutical cleaning validation: the gently curving polished interior of a stainless-steel mixing vessel sweeping across the frame, its brushed-metal surface catching cool cyan reflections, with a single sterile swab tip and faint residue droplets traced by a glowing teal light beam suggesting analytical detection and traceability. Layered over deep navy shadows, a translucent grid of measurement contours and a rising threshold curve hint at health-based exposure limits and carry-over calculations, while a soft fresh-green status glow marks a clean, in-control state. Shallow depth of field, frosted cleanroom light, immaculate clinical-luxury surfaces conveying precision, contamination control and verifiable data. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
